sys_script_include.name: x_rcm_ClaimsService
sys_script_include.script: var x_rcm_ClaimsService = Class.create(); x_rcm_ClaimsService.prototype = { initialize: function(){}, type: 'x_rcm_ClaimsService' };

sys_script_include.script: var x_rcm_DenialService = Class.create(); x_rcm_DenialService.prototype = { initialize: function(){}, type: 'x_rcm_DenialService' };

sys_script_include.script: var x_rcm_ScrubService = Class.create(); x_rcm_ScrubService.prototype = { initialize: function(){}, type: 'x_rcm_ScrubService' };

sys_script_include.script: var x_rcm_RtaService = Class.create(); x_rcm_RtaService.prototype = { initialize: function(){}, type: 'x_rcm_RtaService' };
